task: Fix registered assistants tab showing empty by surfacing codemieAssistants (and codemieSkills) from the MultiProviderConfig top level through ConfigLoader.load().

Root cause is fully identified: loadGlobalConfigProfile line 228 and loadLocalConfigProfile line 255 need codemieAssistants and codemieSkills added to their return spreads. Zero ambiguity.
